subtitles.original: 透明な空から
subtitles.english: From the clear sky

subtitles.original: 真っ直ぐに
subtitles.english: Straight

subtitles.original: 差し込んだ
subtitles.english: pierced

subtitles.original: 優しい朝日
subtitles.english: a gentle morning sun

subtitles.original: 過ぎた季節が歪に
subtitles.english: The seasons that passed, distorted

subtitles.original: 削った今という瞬き
subtitles.english: and carved away this instant called "now"

subtitles.original: どこにも同じものはないの
subtitles.english: There's nothing else like it anywhere

subtitles.original: ほら
subtitles.english: See,

subtitles.original: 生きてる証
subtitles.english: it's proof of being alive

subtitles.original: 風は歌い
subtitles.english: The wind sings

subtitles.original: 雨は語り
subtitles.english: the rain speaks

subtitles.original: たどり着くよ
subtitles.english: I'll reach it

subtitles.original: 光のすみかへ
subtitles.english: the dwelling of light

subtitles.original: 幾重にも
subtitles.english: Layer upon layer

subtitles.original: 重なってる
subtitles.english: are overlapping

subtitles.original: この地球の偶然
subtitles.english: the coincidences of this planet

subtitles.original: 影の向こう
subtitles.english: Beyond the shadow

subtitles.original: 真実の色
subtitles.english: the true colors

subtitles.original: 見つけ出すよ
subtitles.english: I will find

subtitles.original: 光のすみかを
subtitles.english: the dwelling of light

subtitles.original: 一つでも
subtitles.english: If even one thing

subtitles.original: 欠けていたら
subtitles.english: had been missing

subtitles.original: きっと
subtitles.english: we surely

subtitles.original: 出会えてなかったね
subtitles.english: would never have met

subtitles.original: ライブをご覧になっている皆様、
subtitles.english: To everyone watching the live performance,

subtitles.original: こんばんは！
subtitles.english: Good evening!

subtitles.original: ライブの途中ではございますが、ここで！
subtitles.english: We're currently in the middle of the live show, but right here...

subtitles.original: らでの小咄 美術解説のお時間です！
subtitles.english: It's time for Raden's short art commentary!

subtitles.original: 今回ご紹介するのは、こちらでーす！じゃーん！
subtitles.english: The piece we are introducing this time is this one! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: フィンセント・ファン・ゴッホ「ひまわり」
subtitles.english: Vincent van Gogh's "Sunflowers"

subtitles.original: 今回ナショナル・ギャラリーさんより画像をお借りしております
subtitles.english: We have borrowed the image from the National Gallery for this

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: ゴッホといえば「ひまわり」というイメージを持っている方も
subtitles.english: Many of you might associate Van Gogh with "Sunflowers"

subtitles.original: 少なくないのではないでしょうか？
subtitles.english: I'm sure there are quite a few.

subtitles.original: それもそのはず。実はゴッホの描いたひまわりは
subtitles.english: And with good reason. Actually, the sunflowers painted by Van Gogh...

subtitles.original: 一つだけじゃないんです
subtitles.english: ...is not just a single painting.

subtitles.original: この世界に失われたものも含めて
subtitles.english: In this world, including those that have been lost,

subtitles.original: 7つのひまわりがあったんですよ
subtitles.english: there were seven "Sunflowers" paintings.

subtitles.original: さて、では実際に作品をじっくり見てみましょう！
subtitles.english: Now, let's take a closer, careful look at the artwork!

subtitles.original: みんなはどんな感想を持ったかな？
subtitles.english: What kind of impressions did you all get?

subtitles.original: 改めて見てみると、色んなことが見えてきます
subtitles.english: Looking at it again, we can see various details.

subtitles.original: よく見るとひまわりの花の向きはバラバラで
subtitles.english: If you look closely, the directions of the sunflowers are all different,

subtitles.original: 花びらも不揃いですね
subtitles.english: and their petals are also uneven, aren't they?

subtitles.original: しかし温かい黄色が画面全体を包み込むことで
subtitles.english: However, as the warm yellow envelops the entire canvas,

subtitles.original: どこか生命力が溢れているようにも見えませんか？
subtitles.english: doesn't it somehow seem to overflow with vitality?

subtitles.original: ここからはゴッホと黄色、そして
subtitles.english: From here on, let's look at Van Gogh and yellow, and...

subtitles.original: ゴッホとひまわりについて紐解いていきましょう
subtitles.english: ...unravel the connection between Van Gogh and sunflowers.

subtitles.original: 「太陽は淡い硫黄の輝きを伝達するのだ」という言葉を残しているゴッホは
subtitles.english: Van Gogh, who left behind the words "The sun transmits a pale sulfur glow,"

subtitles.original: 太陽の光を黄色で表現しました
subtitles.english: expressed sunlight through the color yellow.

subtitles.original: そして黄色はゴッホにとって生命力の象徴でもあります
subtitles.english: And yellow was also a symbol of vitality for Van Gogh.

subtitles.original: この絵を描いたとき、彼は
subtitles.english: When he painted this picture, he was...

subtitles.original: フランス南部のアルルという街で
subtitles.english: ...in Arles, a town in southern France,

subtitles.original: 心機一転、画家として仲間と頑張っていこうと意気込んでいました
subtitles.english: and eager to work hard as an artist alongside his peers with a fresh start.

subtitles.original: そんな気持ちを黄色に託したのかもしれません
subtitles.english: Perhaps he entrusted those feelings to the color yellow.

subtitles.original: 一方で、この絵のモチーフになっているひまわりについて見てみましょう
subtitles.english: On the other hand, let's look at the sunflowers, the painting's motif.

subtitles.original: ひまわりは太陽に向かって咲きます
subtitles.english: Sunflowers bloom facing the sun.

subtitles.original: 太陽は西洋美術史において、神を象徴します
subtitles.english: In Western art history, the sun symbolizes God.

subtitles.original: それに向かって咲くひまわりは
subtitles.english: The sunflowers blooming towards it...

subtitles.original: 崇拝、従順、忠誠、そして信仰心や愛を象徴します
subtitles.english: ...symbolize adoration, obedience, loyalty, devotion, and love.

subtitles.original: ここで、さらに遠回りして、彼の過去について知っていきましょう
subtitles.english: Here, let's take a further detour to learn about his past.

subtitles.original: 先ほどゴッホがアルルでの生活を始めた時、私は
subtitles.english: Earlier, when I spoke of Van Gogh starting his life in Arles,

subtitles.original: 「心機一転」という表現をしました
subtitles.english: I used the expression "a fresh start."

subtitles.original: 実は彼、元々は牧師さんになりたかったんです
subtitles.english: Actually, he originally wanted to become a pastor.

subtitles.original: 彼は頑張って勉強や奉仕活動に注力しますが
subtitles.english: He studied hard and focused on missionary work,

subtitles.original: 上手くいきませんでした
subtitles.english: but things didn't go well.

subtitles.original: 画家への転身は、牧師さんへの道を断たれた後のことだったんですね
subtitles.english: His turn to becoming a painter happened after his path to the priesthood was cut off.

subtitles.original: そんな彼が描く、信仰の象徴である「ひまわり」
subtitles.english: With that background, his painting of "Sunflowers," a symbol of faith,

subtitles.original: 皆様はどう読み解きますか？
subtitles.english: how do you interpret it?

subtitles.original: 未来への希望 of 光？それとも自分への失望？
subtitles.english: A light of hope for the future? Or disappointment in himself?

subtitles.original: ゴッホの見た「光のすみか」はひまわりの中にあったのかもしれませんね
subtitles.english: The "dwelling of light" Van Gogh saw might have been within sunflowers.

subtitles.original: という感じでございまして
subtitles.english: And that's the story!

subtitles.original: こちらもロンドンのナショナル・ギャラリーさんにて見ることができます！
subtitles.english: You can also see this painting at the National Gallery in London!
